subject: [ONAP] Upgrade crunchy image
commit_message:
[ONAP] Upgrade crunchy image

Set the newest version of crunchy-postgres image.
In this image python 2.x was replaced by python 3.x.
The crunchy-postgres image is used in few projects in the ONAP,
not only in vnfsdk.

Change-Id: I1799b6be66312d2418878533775c741b286bec61
Issue-ID: VNFSDK-647
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Pietruszkiewicz <tomasz.pietruszkiewicz@nokia.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Gitlab Orange 4: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 272536609), max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1111/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 102 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Set the newest version of crunchy-postgres image. In this image python 2.x was replaced by python 3.x. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1111/ )

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

the first gate on AKS is good
the only error is due to a time out on SO workflow to delete the module
on onap-k8s the issue was a config map (but this issue occurred in previous gates)

the second gate (patchset 3 with only commit message update) is not so good but the installation is not as fine as for the first gate

Patch Set 3:

sorry we need a fully green gate for such a change
